overall.description: A smooth aerial journey through a snow-covered mountain canyon in a high-end game engine environment. The camera moves steadily forward between towering rocky cliffs, transitioning from a narrow enclosed passage to a wide open valley with distant snowy peaks visible under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

agents.ego_description: flying steadily forward through the narrow snowy canyon between towering rock walls

entered.detail: tall dark rock face with snow patches rising steeply on the left side
tall dark rock face with snow patches rising steeply on the right side
snow-covered canyon floor with visible path markings
weathered wooden planks or structure partially buried in snow on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera flies through a narrow mountain canyon with steep snow-dusted rock walls towering on both sides. The passage is tight and enclosed, with a snow-covered path below and remnants of wooden structures visible on the left wall. The sky is partially visible above the cliff tops.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening mountain canyon with distant views

events.description: canyon walls begin to recede and open up, revealing distant snowy mountains ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the canyon widens, approaching the open mountain vista ahead

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance at the end of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The canyon gradually widens as the camera moves forward, with the cliff walls moving from immediate proximity to mid-distance. Distant snow-covered mountains become visible at the end of the passage, and the sky opens up fully above. The wooden structure from the previous section passes out of view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain valley with expansive views

events.description: canyon opens fully into a wide snowy valley with panoramic mountain views

agents.ego_description: flying through the wide open valley toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered valley floor stretching toward the distant peaks

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide open snowy valley with the canyon walls now distant on either side. The view expands to show an expansive snow-covered landscape leading toward a distant mountain range under a bright cloudy sky. The spatial layout transitions from enclosed canyon to open wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial movement through a narrow, enclosed mountain canyon that gradually opens into a vast, sunlit snowy wilderness. It begins by gliding through a tight passage between steep, snow-dusted rock walls, passing remnants of wooden structures clinging to the cliffs. As the camera moves forward, the canyon walls steadily recede into the mid-distance, allowing the sky to open fully and revealing distant peaks at the end of the corridor. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the cliffs into a wide open valley, where the restrictive walls give way to an expansive snow-covered landscape. Finally, the view broadens to encompass a distant mountain range under a bright, cloudy sky, completing the transition from a confined gorge to an open alpine vista.
